ogTitle: Fassifern Valley vs Felton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fassifern Valley and Felton.
heading: Fassifern Valley vs Felton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fassifern Valley, Queensland and Felton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Felton has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Fassifern Valley (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fassifern Valley or Felton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fassifern Valley has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Felton scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fassifern Valley scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Felton scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fassifern Valley or Felton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Felton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
